productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Girls Polka Dot Navy Blue Dress
description: Live 37266 Kavita 23rd May 2012   Style NoteMake your own casual fashion rules with this navy blue and white polka dotted dress from united colors of benetton. The pretty girl look is cute, while the cotton fabric will keep her feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with leggings and comfy sandals.Product DetailsNavy blue and white sleeveless polka dotted dress made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with a frill around the neckline, an elasticated midriff with gathers below it and lace above the hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash in 30 degrees with like colours using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorations
